title: Update ws.rs call sites for new connect/disconnect signatures
description:
Update relay/src/ws.rs to use the new connect() return value and new disconnect(pub_id, seq) signature.

What: connect() now returns u64 (the assigned seq). disconnect() now requires seq.

Algorithm:
1. At the connect() call site (~line 364): capture the returned seq: let conn_seq = state.connect(&pub_id, client_tx.clone());
2. At every disconnect() call site (~lines 380, 394, 434, 1680): change state.disconnect(&pub_id) to state.disconnect(&pub_id, conn_seq)
3. conn_seq must be in scope at all disconnect call sites. Check whether any disconnect site is in a different scope/closure than the connect site and adjust variable capture accordingly.
4. No other logic changes — the call sites just need to pass seq through.

Defensive rules:
- conn_seq must be captured before any branch that could call disconnect
- If conn_seq is not yet assigned (pre-connect error path), that path cannot call the new disconnect — verify no such path exists
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-relay succeeds; cargo test -p nie-relay passes; no regression in existing ws.rs tests
